collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (16 total Queries, 16 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `restaurant_tables`.*, COALESCE(NULLIF(zones.zone_name_th, ''), NULLIF(zones.zone_name_en, '')) as zone_name, zones.zone_name_th, zones.zone_name_en, branches.branch_code, branches.branch_name_th, branches.branch_name_en FROM `restaurant_tables` LEFT JOIN `zones` ON `zones`.`id` = `restaurant_tables`.`zone_id` AND `zones`.`deleted_at` IS NULL AND `zones`.`tenant_id` = `restaurant_tables`.`tenant_id` LEFT JOIN `branches` ON `branches`.`id` = `restaurant_tables`.`branch_id` AND `branches`.`deleted_at` IS NULL AND `branches`.`tenant_id` = `restaurant_tables`.`tenant_id` WHERE `restaurant_tables`.`tenant_id` = 1 AND restaurant_tables.deleted_at IS NULL AND `restaurant_tables`.`branch_id` = 1 ORDER BY `restaurant_tables`.`zone_id` ASC, `restaurant_tables`.`sort_order` ASC, `restaurant_tables`.`id` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
